frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present and correct; no angle brackets; allowed-tools hyphenated; owns/composes_with/spawned_by populated. Minor: shared_read uses wildcard ['*'].

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Generate), 5+ keyword variants, names bundled templates. 983 chars — under 1024 ceiling but ~5x the 200-char house target.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 235 lines / ~1680 words — well within guidelines. 6 templates in references/ all linked with when-to-read guidance. No reference >300 lines. No duplication.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Process steps 0a-9 with imperative voice, each explains WHY (42% multi-agent failures, right-sizing rationale). Quality Checklist at step 9 gives a handoff bar.

coordination.notes: Owns contracts/ and schemas/ per v1.1 resolved-conflicts table. owns.patterns = openapi.yaml/asyncapi.yaml. No overlaps. composes_with all resolve (backend-agent, frontend-agent, contract-auditor, qe-agent). spawned_by [orchestrator] accurate.

completeness.notes: All 6 referenced template files exist with reasonable sizes (87-251 lines). Output section enumerates exact deliverable paths. Right-sizing section guards against blind template application.

anti_patterns.notes: Explicit anti-pattern against speculative authoring. Right-Sizing actively guards against over-engineering. No hardcoded specifics. MUSTs bounded with rationale.

important.item: Description 983 chars overshoots 200-char house target by ~5x
